<!-- pr-type: evaluation -->

## Summary

Containment bypass: skip review gate for non-admin users, hide Story Ledger from non-admin UI, fix production RLS vulnerability on `artifact_dependencies`, add CI guard to prevent future RLS gaps, ground seed generation in dream/benchmark templates with structural validation, and fix Polish Pass manuscript text resolution.

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECK EXACTLY ONE — Pass 2 pre-checked as default):

- [x] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files:

- `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — containment bypass logic, structural validation logging
- `lib/evaluation/seed/fullContextStoryLedger.ts` — benchmark context injection + structural validation
- `lib/evaluation/seed/semanticSeedGenerator.ts` — benchmark context injection into claim-based seeds
- `lib/evaluation/seed/benchmarkContextBuilder.ts` — NEW: compiles template + failure modes + gold-standard into prompt context
- `lib/evaluation/phaseLog.ts` — add containment_bypass + phase_0_5a_enhanced_started events
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/ledger/page.tsx` — redirect non-admin users
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — hide review gate section for non-admins
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/JobStatusPoll.tsx` — hide review gate CTA for non-admins
- `app/api/evaluations/[jobId]/polish/route.ts` — fix manuscript text resolution for Polish Pass
- `supabase/migrations/20260602_rls_enforcement_backfill.sql` — RLS enforcement for 5 tables
- `scripts/guard-rls-enforcement.sh` — CI guard: block tables without RLS
- `.github/workflows/kevlar-ci.yml` — wire RLS guard into CI
- `docs/benchmarks/story-ledger/STORY_LEDGER_9_LAYER_TEMPLATE.md` — NEW: blank 9-layer template
- `docs/phase-0-warmup/PHASE_0_WARMUP_BENCHMARK_MANIFEST.md` — add template reference

Out of scope:

- Story Ledger generation logic thresholds unchanged
- No test file modifications
- No scoring logic changes

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: yes

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):

- Review gate is bypassed when containment mode is active — jobs proceed Phase 1A → Phase 2 directly via `autoAcceptStoryLedgerKickForward()` with corruption scoring. Phase 2 still requires `accepted_story_ledger_v1` (auto-created by kick-forward). All other phase gates preserved.

## Contract Integrity

- `JobStatus` contract remains canonical and unchanged (`queued`, `running`, `complete`, `failed`).
- No state-transition rules or DB constraints modified.
- Review gate bypass uses existing `autoAcceptStoryLedgerKickForward()` — no new phase transitions invented.
- RLS migration is additive only (enables RLS on tables that lacked it).

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

Seed generators now receive benchmark template structure, per-layer failure modes, and gold-standard shape expectations — strictly improving output quality over the previous generic prompts. Structural validation after generation catches missing/empty layers. All improvements are non-blocking (kick-forward preserved). Polish Pass fix resolves manuscript text correctly instead of reading a non-existent column.

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_ledger_quality_minimum: NEW — validates hard_facts>=8, end_states>=3, failure_conditions>=3, acceptance_checks>=5, primary_entities>=2, relationships>=2 after full-context ledger generation. Non-blocking (kick-forward with degraded status).

QG_structural_validation: NEW — validates all 9 layers present and non-empty after ledger generation. Non-blocking (logged to phase_log).

no other QG_ behavior changes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Review gate bypass is intentional for containment mode — admin retains full ledger access
- Benchmark context adds ~900 tokens to seed prompts; within model context limits
- RLS enforcement is additive-only; no existing policies modified
- Jobs stuck at review_gate before deploy need manual DB transition (already done for Oz + Untitled Manuscript)
